verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ሰምዐ ፡ አዶኒቤዜቅ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ኢየሩሳሌም ፡ ከመ ፡ ነሥኣ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ለጋይ ፡ ወሠረዋ ፡ በከመ ፡ ገብራ ፡
                  ለኢያሪኮ ፡ ወለንጉሣ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ገብራ ፡ ለጋይ ፡ ወለንጉሣ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ለሊሆሙ ፡ ገረሩ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ገባኦን ፡ ወመጽኡ ፡
                  ኀበ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኀበ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ማእከሎሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And when Adoni-bezec king of Jerusalem heard that Joshua had taken Gai, and had destroyed it, as he did to Jericho and its king, even so they did to Gai and its king, and that the inhabitants of Gabaon had gone over to Joshua and Israel;
translations.kjv: Now it came to pass, when Adonizedec king of Jerusalem had heard how Joshua had taken Ai, and had utterly destroyed it; as he had done to Jericho and her king, so he had done to Ai and her king; and how the inhabitants of Gibeon had made peace with Israel, and were among them;

verses.geez:
ወፈርሁ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ እስመ ፡ ያአምሩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዐባይ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ገባኦን ፡ ከመ ፡ አሐቲ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ [መንግሥት ፡] እስመ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ተዐቢ ፡ አምነ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ወጽኑዓን ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ዕደዊሃ ።

translations.lxx: then they were greatly terrified by them, for the king knew that Gabaon was a great city, as one of the chief cities, and all its men were mighty.
translations.kjv: That they feared greatly, because Gibeon was a great city, as one of the royal cities, and because it was greater than Ai, and all the men thereof were mighty.

verses.geez:
ወለአከ ፡ አዶኒቤዜቅ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ኢየሩሳለም ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኤለም ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ኬብሮን ፡ ወኀበ ፡ ፊዶን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ኢየሬሙት
                  ፡ ወኀበ ፡ ኤዬፍታ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ላኪስ ፡ ወኀበ ፡ ደቢት ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ኦዶሎም ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፤

translations.lxx: So Adoni-bezec king of Jerusalem sent to Elam king of Hebron, and to Phidon king of Jerimuth, and to Jephtha king of Lachis, and to Dabin king of Odollam, saying,
translations.kjv: Wherefore Adonizedec king of Jerusalem sent unto Hoham king of Hebron, and unto Piram king of Jarmuth, and unto Japhia king of Lachish, and unto Debir king of Eglon, saying,

verses.geez:
ንዑአ ፡ ዕረጉአ ፡ ኀቤየአ ፡ ወርድኡኒ ፡ ከመ ፡ ንፅብኦሙ ፡ ለገባኦን ፡ እለ ፡ ገብኡ ፡ ለሊሆሙ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡
                  ወኀበ ፡ ደቂቀአ ፡ እስራኤልአ ።

translations.lxx: Come up hither to me, and help me, and let us take Gabaon; for the Gabaonites have gone over to Joshua and to the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: Come up unto me, and help me, that we may smite Gibeon: for it hath made peace with Joshua and with the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወተጋብኡ ፡ [ወዐርጉ ፡] እሉ ፡ ኀምስቱ ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ ኢየቡሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ኢየሩሳሌም ፡ ወንጉሠ ፡ ኬብሮን ፡ ወንጉሠ
                  ፡ ኢየሬሙት ፡ ወንጉሠ ፡ ላኪስ ፡ ወንጉሠ ፡ ኦዶላም ፡ እሙንቱኒ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ አሕዛቢሆሙ ፡ ወዐገትዋ ፡ ለገባኦን ፡ ወተቃተልዋ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And the five kings of the Jebusites went up, the king of Jerusalem, and the king of Chebron, and the king of Jerimuth, and the king of Lachis, and the king of Odollam, they and all their people; and encamped around Gabaon, and besieged it.
translations.kjv: Therefore the five kings of the Amorites, the king of Jerusalem, the king of Hebron, the king of Jarmuth, the king of Lachish, the king of Eglon, gathered themselves together, and went up, they and all their hosts, and encamped before Gibeon, and made war against it.

verses.geez:
ወለአኩ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ገባኦን ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንተ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገልጋላ ፡ ወይቤሉ ፡
                  ኢትትሀከይአ ፡ እደዊከአ ፡ እምነ ፡ አግብርቲከ ፡ ዕረግ ፡ ኀቤነ ፡ ወ[ፍጡነ ፡] ርድአነ ፡ [ወአድኅነነ ፡] እስመ ፡ ተጋብኡ
                  ፡ ላዕሌነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩአ ፡ ውስተአ ፡ አድባርአ ።

translations.lxx: And the inhabitants of Gabaon sent to Joshua into the camp to Galgala, saying, Slack not thy hands from thy servants: come up quickly to us, and help us, and rescue us; for all the kings of the Amorites who dwell in the hill country are gathered together against us.
translations.kjv: And the men of Gibeon sent unto Joshua to the camp to Gilgal, saying, Slack not thy hand from thy servants; come up to us quickly, and save us, and help us: for all the kings of the Amorites that dwell in the mountains are gathered together against us.

verses.geez:
ወዐርገ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ እምነ ፡ ገልጋላ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ መስተቃትላን ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዘጽኑዕ ፡ ኀይሉ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua went up from Galgala, he and all the people of war with him, every one mighty in strength.
translations.kjv: So Joshua ascended from Gilgal, he, and all the people of war with him, and all the mighty men of valour.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ኢትፍርሆሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ኣገብኦሙ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘይተርፍ ፡
                  እምኔሆሙ ፡ ቅድሜክሙ ፡ ወኢአሐዱ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Joshua, Fear them not, for I have delivered them into thy hands; there shall not one of them be left before you.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Joshua, Fear them not: for I have delivered them into thine hand; there shall not a man of them stand before thee.

verses.geez: ወበጽሖሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ግብተ ፡ በሌሊት ፡ ወፂኦ ፡ እምነ ፡ ገልጋላ ።

translations.lxx: And when Joshua came suddenly upon them, he had advanced all the night out of Galgala.
translations.kjv: Joshua therefore came unto them suddenly, and went up from Gilgal all night.

verses.geez:
ወአደንገፆሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወቀጥቀጦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ ቅጥቃጤ ፡
                  በገባኦን ፡ ወዴገንዎሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ ምዕራገ ፡ ቤቶሮን ፡ ወወግእዎሙ ፡ እስከ ፡ አዜቃ ፡ ወእስከ ፡ መቄዳ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord struck them with terror before the children of Israel; and the Lord destroyed them with a great slaughter at Gabaon; and they pursued them by the way of the going up of Oronin, and they smote them to Azeca and to Makeda.
translations.kjv: And the LORD discomfited them before Israel, and slew them with a great slaughter at Gibeon, and chased them along the way that goeth up to Bethhoron, and smote them to Azekah, and unto Makkedah.

verses.geez:
[ወ]ሶበ ፡ ነትዑ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በውስተ ፡ ሙራዲሁ ፡ ለቤቶሮን ፡ ወወገሮሙ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ እምሰማይ ፡ በእብነ ፡ በረድ ፡ እስከ ፡ አዜቃ ፡ ወፈድፈዱ ፡ እለ ፡ ሞቱ ፡ በእብነ ፡ በረድ ፡ እምነ ፡ እለ
                  ፡ ቀተሉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በኀፂኖሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ቀትል ።

translations.lxx: And when they fled from the face of the children of Israel at the descent of Oronin, then the Lord cast upon them hailstones from heaven to Azeca; and they were more that died by the hailstones, than those whom the children of Israel slew with the sword in the battle.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, as they fled from before Israel, and were in the going down to Bethhoron, that the LORD cast down great stones from heaven upon them unto Azekah, and they died: they were more which died with hailstones than they whom the children of Israel slew with the sword.

verses.geez:
ይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ተናገረ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ምስለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አመ ፡ አግብኦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአሞሬዎን ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  እዴሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ አመ ፡ ቀጥቀጥዎሙ ፡ በገባኦን ፡ ወተቀጥቀጡ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወይቤ ፡
                  ኢየሱስ ፡ ለትቁም ፡ ፀሐይ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ገባኦን ፡ ወወርኅኒ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ ኤሎም ።

translations.lxx: Then Joshua spoke to the Lord, in the day in which the Lord delivered the Amorite into the power of Israel, when he destroyed them in Gabaon, and they were destroyed from before the children of Israel: and Joshua said, Let the sun stand over against Gabaon, and the moon over against the valley of Ælon.
translations.kjv: Then spake Joshua to the LORD in the day when the LORD delivered up the Amorites before the children of Israel, and he said in the sight of Israel, Sun, stand thou still upon Gibeon; and thou, Moon, in the valley of Ajalon.

verses.geez:
ወቆመ ፡ ፀሐይ ፡ ወወርኅ ፡ በምቅዋሞሙ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ እስከ ፡ አጥፍኦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለፀሮሙ ፡ ወናሁ ፡
                  ተጽሕፈ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ መጽሐፍ ፡ በጊዜሃ ፡ ወቆመት ፡ ፀሐይ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወኢሖረት ፡ መንገለ ፡ ዐረብ
                  ፡ እስከ ፡ አምጣነ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ፍጽምት ።

translations.lxx: And the sun and the moon stood still, until God executed vengeance on their enemies; and the sun stood still in the midst of heaven; it did not proceed to set till the end of one day.
translations.kjv: And the sun stood still, and the moon stayed, until the people had avenged themselves upon their enemies. Is not this written in the book of Jasher? So the sun stood still in the midst of heaven, and hasted not to go down about a whole day.

verses.geez:
ወኢኮነት ፡ እንተ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ኢእምቅድሜሃ ፡ ወኢእምድኅሬሃ ፡ ከመ ፡ ያውሥኦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለቃለ ፡
                  እጓለ ፡ እመሕያው ፡ እስመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ፀብአ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And there was not such a day either before or after, so that God should hearken to a man, because the Lord fought on the side of Israel.
translations.kjv: And there was no day like that before it or after it, that the LORD hearkened unto the voice of a man: for the LORD fought for Israel.

verses.geez: ወገብኡ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገልጋላ ።

translations.kjv: And Joshua returned, and all Israel with him, unto the camp to Gilgal.

verses.geez: ወጐዩ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ኀምስቱ ፡ ነገሥት ፡ ወተኀብኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ በአት ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ መቄዳ ።

translations.lxx: And these five kings fled, and hid themselves in a cave that is in Makeda.
translations.kjv: But these five kings fled, and hid themselves in a cave at Makkedah.

verses.geez:
ወዜነውዎ ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ተረክቡ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ኀምስቱ ፡ ነገሥት ፡ ውስተ ፡ በአተ ፡ መቄደ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ተኀብኡ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And it was told Joshua, saying, The five kings have been found hid in the cave that is in Makeda.
translations.kjv: And it was told Joshua, saying, The five kings are found hid in a cave at Makkedah.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ አንኰርኵሩ ፡ እብነ ፡ [ዐቢየ ፡] ውስተ ፡ አፉሃ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ በዐት ፡ ወአንብሩ ፡ ዕደወ ፡
                  ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ እለ ፡ የዐቅብዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua said, Roll stones to the mouth of the cave, and set men to watch over them.
translations.kjv: And Joshua said, Roll great stones upon the mouth of the cave, and set men by it for to keep them:

verses.geez:
ወአንትሙሰ ፡ [ኢትቁሙ ፡] ዴግኑ ፡ ፀረክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ እስከ ፡ ጽንፎሙ ፡ ወኢታብሕዎሙ ፡ ይባኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አህጉሪሆሙ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ አግብኦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደዊነ ።

translations.lxx: But do not ye stand, but pursue after your enemies, and attack the rear of them, and do not suffer them to enter into their cities; for the Lord our God has delivered them into our hands.
translations.kjv: And stay ye not, but pursue after your enemies, and smite the hindmost of them; suffer them not to enter into their cities: for the LORD your God hath delivered them into your hand.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ ሶበ ፡ አኅለቁ ፡ ቀቲሎቶሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ቀትለ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ዘአልቦ ፡ ማኅለቅተ ፡
                  ወእለሂ ፡ ድኅኑ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ድኅኑ ፡ ወቦኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ጽኑዓት ፤

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when Joshua and all Israel ceased destroying them utterly with a very great slaughter, that they that escaped took refuge in the strong cities.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when Joshua and the children of Israel had made an end of slaying them with a very great slaughter, till they were consumed, that the rest which remained of them entered into fenced cities.

verses.geez:
ወገብኡ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መቄዳ ፡ ድኅናኒሆሙ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘለሐሶሙ ፡
                  በልሳኑ ፡ መኑሂ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And all the people returned safe to Joshua to Makeda; and no one of the children of Israel murmured with his tongue.
translations.kjv: And all the people returned to the camp to Joshua at Makkedah in peace: none moved his tongue against any of the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ አርኅውዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ በዐት ፡ ወአምጽእዎሙ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ለእልክቱ ፡ ነገሥት ፡ ኀምስቱ ፡ እምነ ፡
                  ይእቲ ፡ በዐት ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua said, Open the cave, and bring out these five kings out of the cave.
translations.kjv: Then said Joshua, Open the mouth of the cave, and bring out those five kings unto me out of the cave.

verses.geez:
ወገብሩ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ወአ[ው]ጽእዎሙ ፡ ለእልክቱ ፡ ኀምስቱ ፡ ነገሥት ፡ እምውስተ ፡ በዐት ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ኢየሩሳሌም ፡
                  ወንጉሠ ፡ ኬብሮን ፡ ወንጉሠ ፡ ኢየሬሙት ፡ ወንጉሠ ፡ ላኪስ ፡ ወንጉሠ ፡ ኦዶለም ።

translations.lxx: And they brought out the five kings out of the cave, the king of Jerusalem, and the king of Chebron, and the king of Jerimuth, and the king of Lachis, and the king of Odollam.
translations.kjv: And they did so, and brought forth those five kings unto him out of the cave, the king of Jerusalem, the king of Hebron, the king of Jarmuth, the king of Lachish, and the king of Eglon.

verses.geez:
ወወሰድዎሙ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወጸውዖሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለእለ ፡ ተቃተሉ ፡ ወለእለ ፡ ሖሩ ፡ ምስሌሁ
                  ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ወደዩ ፡ እገሪክሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ክሳዳቲሆሙ ፡ [ወወደዩ ፡ እገሪሆሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ክሳዳቲሆሙ ፡]፡

translations.lxx: And when they brought them out to Joshua, then Joshua called together all Israel, and the chiefs of the army that went with him, saying to them, Come forward and set your feet on their necks; and they came and set their feet on their necks.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when they brought out those kings unto Joshua, that Joshua called for all the men of Israel, and said unto the captains of the men of war which went with him, Come near, put your feet upon the necks of these kings. And they came near, and put their feet upon the necks of them.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ኢትፍርህዎሙ ፡ ወኢትደንግፁ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ትብዑ ፡ ወጽንዑ ፡ እስመ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይገብሮሙ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ፀርክሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ትፀብእዎሙ ፡ አንትሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua said to them, Do not fear them, neither be cowardly; be courageous and strong, for thus the Lord will do to all your enemies, against whom ye fight.
translations.kjv: And Joshua said unto them, Fear not, nor be dismayed, be strong and of good courage: for thus shall the LORD do to all your enemies against whom ye fight.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ ቀተሎሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወረገዝዎሙ ፡ ወሰቀልዎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ኀምስቱ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ስቁላኒሆሙ ፡ ዲበ ፡
                  ዕፀው ፡ እስከ ፡ ሰርክ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua slew them, and hanged them on five trees; and they hung upon the trees until the evening.
translations.kjv: And afterward Joshua smote them, and slew them, and hanged them on five trees: and they were hanging upon the trees until the evening.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ዐረበት ፡ ፀሐይ ፡ አዘዘ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወአውረድዎሙ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ወገደፍዎሙ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ በዐት ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ጐዩ ፡ ወአንኰርኰሩ ፡ እበነ ፡ ዐበይተ ፡ ዲቤሃ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ በዐት ፡ እስከ
                  ፡ ዮም ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass toward the setting of the sun, Joshua commanded, and they took them down from the trees, and cast them into the cave into which they had fled for refuge, and rolled stones to the cave, which remain till this day.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass at the time of the going down of the sun, that Joshua commanded, and they took them down off the trees, and cast them into the cave wherein they had been hid, and laid great stones in the cave’s mouth, which remain until this very day.

verses.geez:
ወመቄዳሂ ፡ ነሥእዋ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወቀተልዎሙ ፡ በአፈ ፡ ኀፂን ፡ ወለንጉሣሂ ፡ ወአጥፍእዎሙ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ዘመንፈስ
                  ፡ ዘውስቴታ ፡ ወኢትረፉ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ነፋጺተ ፡ ወኢመ[ነ]ሂ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘድኅነ ፡ ወገብርዎ ፡ ለንጉሠ ፡ መቄዳ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ገብርዎ ፡ ለንጉሠ ፡ ኢያሪኮ ።

translations.lxx: And they took Makeda on that day, and slew the inhabitants with the edge of the sword, and they utterly destroyed every living thing that was in it; and there was none left in it that was preserved and had escaped; and they did to the king of Makeda, as they did to the king of Jericho.
translations.kjv: And that day Joshua took Makkedah, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and the king thereof he utterly destroyed, them, and all the souls that were therein; he let none remain: and he did to the king of Makkedah as he did unto the king of Jericho.

verses.geez: ወሖረ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ እምነ ፡ መቄዳ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ልብና ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua and all Israel with him departed out of Makeda to Lebna, and besieged Lebna.
translations.kjv: Then Joshua passed from Makkedah, and all Israel with him, unto Libnah, and fought against Libnah:

verses.geez:
ወአግብኣ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሆሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወነሥእዋ ፡ ወነሥኦ ፡ ለንጉሣ ፡ ወቀተሎ ፡ በአፈ ፡ ኀፂን
                  ፡ ወኢያትረፈ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘመንፈስ ፡ ወኢድኅነ ፡ ወኢአሐዱ ፡ ነፋጺት ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ወገብርዎ ፡ ለንጉሣ ፡
                  በከመ ፡ ገብርዎ ፡ ለንጉሠ ፡ ኢያሪኮ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord delivered it into the hands of Israel: and they took it, and its king, and slew the inhabitants with the edge of the sword, and every thing breathing in it; and there was not left in it any that survived and escaped; and they did to its king, as they did to the king of Jericho.
translations.kjv: And the LORD delivered it also, and the king thereof, into the hand of Israel; and he smote it with the edge of the sword, and all the souls that were therein; he let none remain in it; but did unto the king thereof as he did unto the king of Jericho.

verses.geez:
ወሖረ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ እምነ ፡ ልብና ፡ ውስተ ፡ ላኪስ ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ላዕሌሃ ፡ ወተቃተልዋ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua and all Israel with him departed from Lebna to Lachis, and he encamped about it, and besieged it.
translations.kjv: And Joshua passed from Libnah, and all Israel with him, unto Lachish, and encamped against it, and fought against it:

verses.geez:
ወአግብኣ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለላኪስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሆሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወነሥእዋ ፡ በሳኒተ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወቀተልዎሙ ፡
                  በአፈ ፡ ኀፂን ፡ ወአጥፍእዋ ፡ በከመ ፡ ገብርዋ ፡ ለሌብና ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord delivered Lachis into the hands of Israel; and they took it on the second day, and they put the inhabitants to death with the edge of the sword, and utterly destroyed it, as they had done to Lebna.
translations.kjv: And the LORD delivered Lachish into the hand of Israel, which took it on the second day, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and all the souls that were therein, according to all that he had done to Libnah.

verses.geez:
ወዐርገ ፡ ይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ [ኤ]ላም ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ጋዜስ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይር[ድኣ] ፡ ለላኪስ ፡ ወቀተሎ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ በአፈ ፡
                  ኀፂን ፡ ወለሕዝቡሂ ፡ እስከ ፡ ኢያትረፈ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ነፋጺተ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘደኅነ ።

translations.lxx: Then Elam the king of Gazer went up to help Lachis; and Joshua smote him and his people with the edge of the sword, until there was not left to him one that was preserved and escaped.
translations.kjv: Then Horam king of Gezer came up to help Lachish; and Joshua smote him and his people, until he had left him none remaining.

verses.geez:
ወሖረ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ እምነ ፡ ላኪስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኦዶለም ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ላዕሌሃ ፡
                  ወ[ተቃ]ተልዋ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua and all Israel with him departed from Lachis to Odollam, and he besieged it and took it.
translations.kjv: And from Lachish Joshua passed unto Eglon, and all Israel with him; and they encamped against it, and fought against it:

verses.geez:
ወአግብኣ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሆሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወነሥእዋ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወቀተልዋ ፡ በአፈ ፡ ኀፂን
                  ፡ ወቀተሉ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘመንፈስ ፡ ዘውስቴታ ፡ በከመ ፡ ገብርዋ ፡ ለላኪስ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord delivered it into the hand of Israel; and he took it on that day, and slew the inhabitants with the edge of the sword, and slew every thing breathing in it, as they did to Lachis.
translations.kjv: And they took it on that day, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and all the souls that were therein he utterly destroyed that day, according to all that he had done to Lachish.

verses.geez: ወሖረ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኬብሮን ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ላዕሌሃ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua and all Israel with him departed to Chebron, and encamped about it.
translations.kjv: And Joshua went up from Eglon, and all Israel with him, unto Hebron; and they fought against it:

verses.geez:
ወቀተልዋ ፡ በአፈ ፡ ኀፂን ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ዘመንፈስ ፡ ዘውስቴታ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘድኅነ ፡ በከመ ፡ ገብርዋ ፡ ለኦዶለም ፡
                  ወአጥፍእዋ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: And he smote it with the edge of the sword, and all the living creatures that were in it; there was no one preserved: they destroyed it and all things in it, as they did to Odollam.
translations.kjv: And they took it, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and the king thereof, and all the cities thereof, and all the souls that were therein; he left none remaining, according to all that he had done to Eglon; but destroyed it utterly, and all the souls that were therein.

verses.geez: ወገብአ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዳቢር ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ላዕሌሃ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua and all Israel returned to Dabir; and they encamped about it;
translations.kjv: And Joshua returned, and all Israel with him, to Debir; and fought against it:

verses.geez:
ወነሥእዋ ፡ ወለንጉሣሂ ፡ ወለአህጉሪሃኒ ፡ ወቀተልዋ ፡ ወአጥፍእዋ ፡ በአፈ ፡ ኀፂን ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ዘመንፈስ ፡ ዘውስቴታ ፡
                  ወአልቦ ፡ ዘአትረፉ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ዘድኅነ ፡ በከመ ፡ ገብርዋ ፡ ለኬብሮን ፡ ወለንጉሣ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ገብርዋ ፡ ለዳቤር ፡
                  ወለንጉሣ ።

translations.lxx: and they took it, and its king, and its villages: and he smote it with the edge of the sword, and they destroyed it, and every thing breathing in it; and they did not leave in it any one that was preserved: as they did to Chebron and her king, so they did to Dabir and her king.
translations.kjv: And he took it, and the king thereof, and all the cities thereof; and they smote them with the edge of the sword, and utterly destroyed all the souls that were therein; he left none remaining: as he had done to Hebron, so he did to Debir, and to the king thereof; as he had done also to Libnah, and to her king.

verses.geez:
ወቀተለ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ምድሮሙ ፡ ለደወለ ፡ አድባር ፡ ወናቤ ፡ ወአሕቅልቲሃ ፡ ወአሴዶት ፡ ወነገሥታ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡
                  ዘአትረፉ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ዘድኅነ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘመንፈሰ ፡ ሕይወት ፡ አጥፍአ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፤

translations.lxx: And Joshua smote all the land of the hill country, and Nageb and the plain country, and Asedoth, and her kings, they did not leave of them one that was saved: and they utterly destroyed every thing that had the breath of life, as the Lord God of Israel commanded,
translations.kjv: So Joshua smote all the country of the hills, and of the south, and of the vale, and of the springs, and all their kings: he left none remaining, but utterly destroyed all that breathed, as the LORD God of Israel commanded.

verses.geez: እምነ ፡ ቃዴስ ፡ በርኔ ፡ እስከ ፡ ጋዜስ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ጎሶም ፡ እስከ ፡ ገባኦን ።

translations.lxx: from Cades Barne to Gaza, all Gosom, as far as Gabaon.
translations.kjv: And Joshua smote them from Kadeshbarnea even unto Gaza, and all the country of Goshen, even unto Gibeon.

verses.geez: ወቀተለ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ነገሥቶሙ ፡ ወምድሮሙሂ ፡ በምዕር ፡ እስመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይፀብእ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua smote, once for all, all their kings, and their land, because the Lord God of Israel fought on the side of Israel.
translations.kjv: And all these kings and their land did Joshua take at one time, because the LORD God of Israel fought for Israel.

verses.geez: [ወገብአ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገልጋላ ።]

translations.kjv: And Joshua returned, and all Israel with him, unto the camp to Gilgal.
